title: centaurea cariensis subsp. microlepis
intro: Centaurea cariensis subsp. microlepis is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Centaurea cariensis plant, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Centaurea cariensis subsp. microlepis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also sometimes used in traditional folk medicine and homeopathy.
